_comment: Canonical schema for gtm_synthesis_v2. Write target: gtm_strategies table. clients.gtm_synthesis = DEPRECATED_READONLY.
_rules: No pilot_test_logic, sample sizes, or H1/F1/CTA1 counts — those are authoritative in ROADMAP.md
No priority on cells — all valid cells included, qualification_framework does the filtering
icp_key and vertical_key are SEPARATE fields — never equate them
campaign_matrix_seed.length = valid cells count, NOT personas x verticals x solutions
No hooks, subject lines, or outreach copy in synthesis
cta_directions are locked to [info_send, case_study_send] during H1/F1 — do not include in synthesis
company_thesis: Sharp 1-sentence summary of what the company does and for whom

buyer_personas.title: Job title
pain_points: What keeps them up at night

persona_map.label: CX Leadership
persona_map.primary_pain: Describe the observable pain this persona experiences

vertical_map.vertical_pain: Describe the pain specific to this vertical (e.g., consultant burnout from manual queue management)

proof_assets.use_for: Which vertical / persona / stage this proof works best for

campaign_matrix_seed.icp_key: icp segment key slug (firmographic — matches icp_segments[].key)

messaging_direction.core_angle: Single most compelling outbound angle for this client
messaging_direction.proof_narrative: How to weave proof without being salesy
messaging_direction.tone_instructions: Specific tone guidance for copy team

research_context.competitive_landscape: Key competitors and how client differentiates
research_context.market_signals: Market trends and trigger events relevant to outbound

product_terminology._note: Extract exact terms the product uses for mechanisms, features, components

vertical_terminology._note: Per-vertical customer and expert terms extracted from research — used in messaging

exa_sources: URLs or source descriptions from Exa research

open_questions: Questions that need answers before or during execution
internal_notes: Notes for internal use — not included in external doc
